channel.title: Theme settings
channel.description: Hi, I'm new on Frontity. I'm trying to set frontity with my wordpress website. I installed this theme: [Jupiter](https://jupiterx.com/) Is it compatible with frontity? Can I use mars-theme into the settings to manage it? Thanks and regards. Carlo

item.title: Theme settings
item.dc:creator: carloliaci
item.description:
Hi,
I’m new on Frontity.
I’m trying to set frontity with my wordpress website.
I installed this theme: Jupiter
Is it compatible with frontity?
Can I use mars-theme into the settings to manage it?
Thanks and regards.
Carlo

Read full topic
